title: Ashen + Advanced Netherite Support
description: A small, 16x pack adding rudimentary compatibility between Ashen 16x and Advanced Netherite
body:
![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)

Want to play Ashen with [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite)? Tired of those Netherite Blocks, armors, and tools using vanilla textures and looking out of place with Ashen? Then this Add-On is for you!

Place this pack *above* Ashen in your load order.
___

This pack is designed and intended for use with [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen/) and [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite).
___
